hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '"file_path":.*frontend/src'; then cd /Users/nish/Documents/startitup/Startitup/frontend && npm run lint --silent 2>&1 | head -30; fi

echo '─────────────────────────────────────────'
echo 'Session complete. Suggested next steps:'
echo '  /new-feature  — start a full-stack feature'
echo '  /testing       — write tests for recent changes'
echo '  /docs          — document recent changes'
echo 'Agents: deployer | planner | ui-reviewer | ux-enhancer | docs-writer | security-reviewer | code-reviewer | db-analyst'
echo '─────────────────────────────────────────'
